name: Pugna
description: Who needs a blade when you have oblivion?

abilities.name: Oblivion Savant
abilities.description: Grants self outgoing spell damage amplification per Tower destroyed in the game.

abilities.name: Nether Blast
abilities.description: An exploding pulse that deals damage to enemy units in the area.

abilities.name: Decrepify
abilities.description: Slows an enemy unit and reduces its magic resistance while rendering it ethereal. For affected allied units, Pugna grants them incoming heal amplification without slowing their movement speed.

abilities.name: Nether Ward
abilities.description: Increases cast range. The self spell damage amplification and enemy reduction via the Nether Ward refraction is less effective to Pugna and all affected enemy heroes respectively.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: When cast on an enemy unit, Life Drain damages the enemy unit and self-heals. When casting on an allied unit, Life Drain succors the allied unit while damaging Pugna. Applies a debuff that reduces the affected enemy hero's outgoing spell damage while channeling. Reduces cooldown.
